title: Porcelain Poems
description: A Desert Faith smallness note turning bathroom time, thinking, AI conversation, and bodily routine into comic practical poetics.

motifMap.meaning: The post opens by measuring an ordinary bodily habit as accumulated life-time.
The bathroom becomes a private logistical chamber for thinking and talking.
Low bodily circumstance is converted into a joking poetic site.

excerpt:
How many hours?
That is the question.

editHistory.notes: Manual live Substack check performed with user permission through the in-app browser because shell DNS/live extractor access was unavailable. Classified as Desert Faith / Logistical Smallness from the actual post text.
